workspace.startInvestigationDesc: Create a dossier to organize vendors, institutions, and contracts under a single investigation.
workspace.step1: Search for a vendor or institution
workspace.step3: Analyze their contracts and export findings

guide.title: Start Your Investigation
guide.description: Use dossiers to organize your investigation. Add vendors, institutions, and contracts to build a complete picture of procurement patterns.
guide.step1Description: Find vendors, institutions, or contracts of interest
guide.step2Description: Save relevant entities to a named investigation folder
guide.step3Description: Review patterns, risk scores, and export your findings
guide.searchVendorLink: Or search for a vendor to start
guide.example1: Track a contractor across multiple agencies over several years
guide.example2: Compare risk scores for contracts awarded before vs. after elections
guide.example3: Research single-bid award patterns in the health sector for a story
guide.howItWorksP1: Dossiers are private investigation folders that live in your browser. Each dossier can hold any mix of vendors, institutions, and individual contracts.
guide.howItWorksP2: Use the Add to Dossier button on any vendor or institution profile page to start gathering research material. Dossiers persist between sessions so you can return to an investigation later.
guide.howItWorksP3: When you are ready to publish or share, Export your dossier as a CSV or structured JSON file containing all collected entities and their risk metadata.

annotations.title: My Annotations
annotations.description: Private notes saved locally in your browser.
annotations.empty: No annotations yet. Click the sticky note icon on any contract or vendor to add a note.
